search:spring-cloud-gateway:spring cloud.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `wrk` for benchmarking gateway performance.
  
- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Cloud Gateway: [Check latest version on Maven Central](https://search.maven.org/artifact/org.springframework.cloud/spring-cloud-starter-gateway)
  - Spring Boot: [Check latest version on Maven Central](https://search.maven.org/artifact/org.springframework.boot/spring-boot)

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.routes`: Define routes for gateway.
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.discovery.locator.enabled`: Enable service discovery for routing.
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.httpclient.pool.max-idle-per-route`: Set max idle connections per route.
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.httpclient.pool.max-connections`: Set total max connections.

- **Performance Optimization Tips**:
  - Monitor response body size and optimize accordingly.
  - Adjust HTTP client pool settings for better resource management.

- **CLI Commands**: 
  - `java -jar spring-cloud-gateway.jar --server.port=8080`
  - `curl -X GET http://localhost:8080/actuator/metrics`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Cloud Gateway: 3.1.4.RELEASE
  - Spring Boot: 2.7.5

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].id`: Unique identifier for the route.
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].uri`: Target URI of the route.
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].predicates[0]`: Predicate to match requests, e.g., Path=/example/**.
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].filters[0]`: Filter to modify requests or responses, e.g., RewritePath=/example/(?<segment>.*), /new/$\{segment}.

- **CLI Commands**: Use `mvn clean install` to build your Spring Cloud Gateway project.
- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Boot: 3.0.x
  - Spring Cloud Gateway: 3.0.x
  - Spring Security: 5.7.x
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.routes`: Define routes for your gateway.
  - `spring.security.user.name` and `spring.security.user.password`: Configure basic authentication.
  - `management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=*`: Expose all management endpoints.
  - `server.port`: Set the port for your gateway.
